revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{各世紀のキリスト教徒}} {{デフォルトソート:16きりすときようと}} [[Category:16世紀の人物|きりすときようと]] Catego…」

revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:16世紀のキリスト教徒]] [[ar:Category:مسيحيو القرن 16]] [[az:Category:XVI əsr xristianları]] [[be_x_old:Category:Хрысьціянскія дзеячы XVI стагодзьдзя]] [[bn:Category:১৬শ শতাব্দীর খ্রিস্টান]] [[commons:Category:16th-century Christians]] [[eo:Category:Kristanoj de la 16-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Cristianos del siglo XVI]] [[fa:Category:مسیحیان سده ۱۶ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Personnalité du christianisme au XVIe siècle]] [[ko:Category:16세기 기독교인]] [[mk:Category:Христијани од 16 век]] [[pt:Category:Cristãos do século XVI]] [[tr:Category:16. yüzyılda Hristiyanlar]] [[ur:Category:سولہویں صدی کی مسیحی شخصیات]] [[zh:Category:16世纪基督徒]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:キリシタン]].

==English Content== {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[ar:Category:تصنيف:مسيحيو القرن 16]] [[az:Category:Kateqoriya:XVI əsr xristianları]] [[be_x_old:Category:Катэгорыя:Хрысьціянскія дзеячы XVI стагодзьдзя]] [[bn:Category:বিষয়শ্রেণী:১৬শ শতাব্দীর খ্রিস্টান]] [[commons:Category:Category:16th-century Christians]] [[en:Category:16th-century Christians]] [[en:Category:16th-century Christians]] [[eo:Category:Kategorio:Kristanoj de la 16-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Categoría:Cristianos del siglo XVI]] [[fa:Category:رده:مسیحیان سده ۱۶ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Catégorie:Personnalité du christianisme au XVIe siècle]] [[ja:Category:16世紀のキリスト教徒]] [[ko:Category:분류:16세기 기독교인]] [[mk:Category:Категорија:Христијани од 16 век]] [[pt:Category:Categoria:Cristãos do século XVI]] [[tr:Category:Kategori:16. yüzyılda Hristiyanlar]] [[ur:Category:زمرہ:سولہویں صدی کی مسیحی شخصیات]] [[zh:Category:Category:16世纪基督徒]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
revision.text:
==English Content== {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}} [[ar:Category:تصنيف:مسيحيو القرن 16]] [[az:Category:Kateqoriya:XVI əsr xristianları]] [[be_x_old:Category:Катэгорыя:Хрысьціянскія дзеячы XVI стагодзьдзя]] [[bn:Category:বিষয়শ্রেণী:১৬শ শতাব্দীর খ্রিস্টান]] [[co:commons:Category:Category:16th-century Christians]] [[en:Category:16th-century Christians]] [[en:Category:16th-century Christians]] [[eo:Category:Kategorio:Kristanoj de la 16-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Categoría:Cristianos del siglo XVI]] [[fa:Category:رده:مسیحیان سده ۱۶ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Catégorie:Personnalité du christianisme au XVIe siècle]] [[ja:Category:16世紀のキリスト教徒]] [[ko:Category:분류:16세기 기독교인]] [[mk:Category:Категорија:Христијани од 16 век]] [[pt:Category:Categoria:Cristãos do século XVI]] [[tr:Category:Kategori:16. yüzyılda Hristiyanlar]] [[ur:Category:زمرہ:سولہویں صدی کی مسیحی شخصیات]] [[zh:Category:Category:16世纪基督徒]]
==Local Content== {{wikidata link|Q8100393}} [[Category:16th-century Christianity|Christians]] [[Category:16th-century people by religion|Christians]] [[Category:Christians by century]] [[Category:Christians of the Early Modern era]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]]

revision.comment: adding dummy category to make categories work
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=16th-century_Christians here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
